one_time_description: Community Benefits Agreement with the City of Toronto related to Greenlane Landfill site - $2.5M total ($1.25M lump sum by May 2023, remainder over 13 years). Signed April 1, 2023 as subsequent event.
economic_notes: Nation operates Paradise Bingo (1748960 Ontario Limited) and Munsee-Delaware Nation Charity Association as fully consolidated subsidiaries. OFNLP Gaming reserve of $3,712,782. Located in Muncey, Ontario.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations - Nation unable to determine if asbestos removal obligation exists for buildings. Fiscal year is 2023 (ended March 31, 2023). Budget figures used for revenue/expenses/accumulated surplus as actual 2023 figures appear in budget column of statement - actual 2023 actuals are: revenue $10,868,140, expenses $9,674,677, surplus $1,207,623, accumulated surplus $15,153,474. Subsequent event: $2.5M Community Benefits Agreement with City of Toronto re Greenlane Landfill signed April 1, 2023. Two fully consolidated subsidiaries: Paradise Bingo and Munsee-Delaware Nation Charity Association. Remuneration schedule not included in provided text. Council honoraria disclosed as $100,809 and staff honoraria $16,762 in expenditure by object. Restricted assets include CMHC operating and replacement reserves totaling $205,030 plus trust funds in Ottawa of $90,768.
